---
title: Methods
---

Ammonyte provides three methodologically distinct approaches for detecting abrupt transitions in paleoclimate time series:

- **[Augmented KS Test](augmented_ks_test.qmd)** — statistical distribution-based detection using the augmented Kolmogorov–Smirnov test
- **[Ruptures](ruptures.qmd)** — optimization-based changepoint detection via cost function minimization
- **[LERM](lerm.qmd)** — nonlinear dynamical analysis using Laplacian Eigenmaps of Recurrence Matrices
